tasks.label: perl: syntax check current file
tasks.command: case "${file}" in *.pl|*.pm|*.t|*.cgi) perl -cw "${file}" ;; *) echo 'Skip: current file is not a Perl script: ${file}' ;; esac

tasks.label: perl: reset debugger
tasks.command: pkill -f '[P]erl::LanguageServer::DebuggerBridge' 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f '[/]workspace/public/index.cgi' 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f '${workspaceFolder}/public/index[.]cgi' 2>/dev/null || true
